note.message: with green, make a slip knot
note.sourceText: with green, make a slip knot

statements.sourceText: with green, make a slip knot

operation.note: to join the piece in a circle

statements.sourceText: sl st in the first ch you made, to join the piece in a circle

body.sourceText: [ch 3, sl st in the next ch of the circle]

statements.sourceText: sl st in the next ch of the circle

repeat.normalizationNote: Original repeat count was 14, but the final iteration has a different target for the sl st. Normalized to a homogeneous repeat of 13 plus the final iteration flattened below.

statements.sourceText: [ch 3, sl st in the next ch of the circle] 14 times (work your last sl st into the st that joined the circle)
sl st into the st that joined the circle

rounds.sourceText: with green, make a slip knot and ch 14; sl st in the first ch you made, to join the piece in a circle; [ch 3, sl st in the next ch of the circle] 14 times (work your last sl st into the st that joined the circle)
rounds.title: Rnd 1

statements.sourceText: Fasten off and weave in the ends (or keep them for sewing, if the wreath will become an applique).

rounds.sourceText: Fasten off and weave in the ends (or keep them for sewing, if the wreath will become an applique).
rounds.title: Fasten off and weave in the ends

operation.note: Take a 30-40cm/12-16" length of red yarn, thread it into a yarn needle and weave it through the chain loops around the wreath, starting and ending at the join. Tie the ends in a bow, then cut them to the length you like.

statements.sourceText: Take a 30-40cm/12-16" length of red yarn, thread it into a yarn needle and weave it through the chain loops around the wreath, starting and ending at the join. Tie the ends in a bow, then cut them to the length you like.

rounds.sourceText: Take a 30-40cm/12-16" length of red yarn, thread it into a yarn needle and weave it through the chain loops around the wreath, starting and ending at the join. Tie the ends in a bow, then cut them to the length you like.
rounds.title: Add red yarn bow

note.message: Optionally, if your yarn holds knots poorly or tends to fray at the ends, dot some clear nail polish or white glue at the knot and at the ends, to secure them.
note.sourceText: Optionally, if your yarn holds knots poorly or tends to fray at the ends, dot some clear nail polish or white glue at the knot and at the ends, to secure them.

statements.sourceText: Optionally, if your yarn holds knots poorly or tends to fray at the ends, dot some clear nail polish or white glue at the knot and at the ends, to secure them.

rounds.sourceText: Optionally, if your yarn holds knots poorly or tends to fray at the ends, dot some clear nail polish or white glue at the knot and at the ends, to secure them.
rounds.title: Optionally secure knot and ends
